what: Validate markdown content is non-empty and well-structured
why: Reject empty or trivial content that wouldn't be useful as knowledge

output.console: Content validation result with structure quality indicators

success_handling.criteria: Markdown content is non-empty, between 10 and 10,000 characters, and contains recognizable structure (headings, paragraphs, or code blocks)

error_handling.criteria: Markdown body is empty or contains only whitespace
error_handling.action: Return validation error requiring non-empty content

error_handling.criteria: Content is below the minimum useful length threshold but not empty
error_handling.action: Return warning suggesting the content may be too brief to be useful, allow user to proceed

event.message: Content may be too short to be useful: {content_length} characters

decisions.condition: Content is non-empty and meets length threshold

decisions.outcome: Abort creation, return error to user

decisions.condition: Content is too short but non-empty
decisions.outcome: Warn user, allow proceeding if confirmed
